content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve Project Stalls
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on SaaS builds. Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship professional projects faster as a freelancer.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck isn't your coding ability; it's the friction of scaffolding. By utilizing a production-ready SaaS starter kit, you eliminate the 'blank page' syndrome. Combine this with the autonomous execution of Claude Code and the modular power of Antigravity to turn weeks of boilerplate setup into mere minutes of configuration.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the initial spark of a project is electric, but by the third day, you're drowning in authentication middleware, database schemas, and endless environment configurations. The freelance graveyard is filled with half-finished SaaS projects that never saw the light of day because the setup phase consumed all your creative momentum.

It is time to stop reinventing the wheel. Professional-grade shipping requires an architectural shift from manual coding to intelligent orchestration. We are moving past the era of writing boilerplate by hand and stepping into a workflow where your starter kit acts as the foundation, allowing you to focus purely on the high-value features your clients actually pay for.

steps.title: Architecting the Core
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using a proven SaaS starter kit to ensure type-safety, authentication, and billing are handled out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular Next.js 15 project structure with Supabase integration, Stripe subscription hooks, and a clean Tailwind CSS architecture. Focus on a separation of concerns between API routes and UI components.

steps.title: Automating Database Schemas
steps.description: Use your starter kit's schema definition to define your data models without manual SQL migration headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a relational schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including users, workspaces, and subscription tiers. Ensure RLS policies are included for Supabase.

steps.title: Implementing Auth Middleware
steps.description: Secure your routes instantly by deploying standardized authentication middleware provided by the kit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Next.js middleware to protect dashboard routes, enforce session validation, and redirect unauthenticated users to the pricing page.

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Injection
steps.description: Inject client-ready components that align with your brand, skipping the manual styling phase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive sidebar navigation component and a pricing grid using Radix UI primitives and Tailwind. Ensure dark mode support is baked in.

steps.title: Finalizing the Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Automate your CI/CD flow so that every push is a deployment, keeping your client updated in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel. Include linting and build checks.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'golden branch' in your starter kit that is pre-configured with your specific client preferences to save 4 hours of setup per project.
Use Claude Code to perform 'automated code reviews' on your own PRs before merging to catch performance regressions early.
When working with clients, deploy a staging environment immediately; visibility reduces scope creep and builds trust.
Keep your database migrations strictly version-controlled; never edit the database directly via UI once the project starts.
Modularize your API routes into 'features' rather than 'pages' to make the codebase more maintainable for future feature requests.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, iterate on your core business logic and invite your first client to the staging environment to collect immediate feedback.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to stop stalling and start shipping. Stop fighting the boilerplate and reclaim your time as a high-output developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
